author: Saurabh Aggarwal
authorHeadline: Technical Recruiter at CoverStack | Hiring Backend, Frontend & QA Talent | 10+ Years in Sales, Bulk & Tech Hiring | Talent Acquisition Specialist
text:
Rejections don’t slow us down. Silence doesn’t stop us. Delays don’t define us.

This week has been intense.

Multiple profiles shared.
Several interviews scheduled.
Some candidates cleared rounds.
Some got rejected.
Some are still waiting for final approvals.

That’s how real growth works — not perfect, but persistent.

In recruitment, you learn quickly:
✔ Every rejection is redirection.
✔ Every delay teaches patience.
✔ Every shortlist brings hope.
✔ Every offer changes someone’s life.

Success is not about one big closure.
It’s about showing up every single day — even when outcomes are uncertain.
Momentum is built in follow-ups.
Confidence is built in conversations.
Impact is built in consistency.

And we’re just getting started. 🚀

🔥 We are actively hiring!

If you’re a Backend Developer or Node.js Developer looking for a strong growth opportunity, let’s connect.

Your next role might be one conversation away.

#Hiring #NodeJS #BackendDeveloper #TechHiring #Opportunities #GrowthMindset #RecruitmentLife

text:
🚀 *We’re Hiring – Mid-Level Serverless Developer (Node.js / TypeScript, JavaScript)*

Surge You HR Consultant is looking for a talented Mid-Level Serverless Developer to join a growing tech team working on scalable AWS serverless systems.

📍 Location: Mumbai (Hybrid)
💼 Experience: 3–6 Years
🕒 Employment Type: Full-time
⚡ *IMMEDIATE JOINERS PREFERRED*
❗ **ONLY MUMBAI CANDIDATES**

🔧 *Key Responsibilities:*
• Develop and maintain serverless applications using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and EventBridge
• Build scalable backend services using Node.js and TypeScript
• Refactor legacy systems into modern serverless architecture
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
• Collaborate with architects and cross-functional teams

✅ *Requirements:*
• 3–6 years experience in Node.js and TypeScript
• Hands-on experience with AWS services (Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, Cognito)
• Strong understanding of serverless architecture
• Experience with Jest, Cypress, or similar testing tools
• AWS CDK or SAM knowledge is a plus

🌟 Competitive salary | Hybrid work | Strong growth opportunities

📩 Interested candidates can share their CV via email: hr.surgeyou@gmail.com

author: Aman Pandey
authorHeadline: 👨‍💼Jr.Executive HR at C-Zentrix | Recruitment | Employee Engagement | Branch Operations | Team Leadership | HR Operations | Performance & People Management
text:
Urgent🚀 We’re Hiring: Node.js Developer 🚀
📍 Location: Gurugram / Full-Time
 
🏢 Company: C-Zentrix
🔹 About the Role
We’re looking for a skilled Node.js Developer to join our growing tech team. In this role, you’ll be responsible for building scalable, high-performance backend applications and APIs. You’ll collaborate closely with frontend developers, product managers, and designers to deliver reliable and efficient solutions.

🔹 Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and maintain server-side applications using Node.js
Build and manage RESTful APIs and backend services
Write clean, efficient, secure, and well-documented code
Integrate databases, third-party services, and external APIs
Optimize application performance and scalability
Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve production issues
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement business requirements

🔹 Required Skills & Qualifications
Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+)
Hands-on experience with Node.js and frameworks like Express.js
Experience with databases (MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL)
Understanding of asynchronous programming, event loop, and non-blocking I/O
Knowledge of REST APIs, authentication, and authorization
Familiarity with version control systems (Git)
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills

🔹 Preferred Qualifications
Experience with TypeScript
Knowledge of microservices architecture
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
Familiarity with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha, Chai)
Basic understanding of frontend technologies (React, HTML, CSS)

🎓 Education
UG: B.Tech (CS & IT) – Computers / Related Specialization
PG: M.Tech / MCA / MS – Computers

📩 Interested?
 Please share your updated CV at hr@c-zentrix.com, aman.pandey@c-zentrix.com

author: Hanzla Akhtar
authorHeadline: Human Resources Specialist | Global IT Recruitment, Critical Hiring
text:
Hiring: Blockchain Developer (L2/L3)
Immediate candidate preferences 
Location: Noida (Hybrid) / Remote
Experience: 6–8 Years
Employment Type: Permanent
Priority: High

We are looking for an experienced Blockchain Developer to drive technical design, system re-architecture, and distributed ledger solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

• Develop Smart Contracts (Chaincode) and implement Chaincode interfaces
• Design and build distributed ledger / blockchain architecture solutions
• Setup and configure Hyperledger Fabric
• Develop backend APIs using Node.js
• Participate in architecture discussions and code reviews
• Collaborate with Product Managers and cross-functional teams

Required Skills:

• 4+ years of hands-on Blockchain development experience (Node.js or Go)
• Strong expertise in Hyperledger Fabric implementation
• Experience building applications on HF using Angular or React with Node.js services
• Knowledge of consensus mechanisms: PBFT, Raft, PoA, PoC, PoW
• Understanding of Public, Private, and Consortium blockchain models
• Exposure to DevOps tools: Git, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes
• Cloud exposure (AWS / Azure / IBM Bluemix) is a plus

If you are interested or have relevant profiles, please DM me or share your CV at: hanzla.akhtar@trbitix.com

author: Sneha M.
authorHeadline: Hiring #QA Automation Engineer, #Content Writer #Laravel Developer #Digital Marketing Lead
text:
🚀 We’re Hiring: Software Developer (#Laravel)
 📍 3–5 Years Experience | Shopify Ecosystem | Full-time

We’re looking for a strong Backend Developer who can build scalable applications and powerful integrations in the eCommerce space.

🔥 What You’ll Work On:
a. Develop robust applications using PHP & Laravel
b. Build and consume GraphQL & REST APIs
c. Design and optimize MySQL/PostgreSQL databases
d. Integrate with Shopify APIs & Webhooks
e. Implement search solutions (Algolia / Elasticsearch / Meilisearch)
f. Ensure performance, scalability & clean architecture

✅ Must Have:
a. 3–5 years of solid Laravel experience
b. Deep Laravel knowledge (Eloquent, Queues, Middleware, Jobs)
c. Strong SQL & GraphQL API expertise
d. Git-based collaborative workflows

⭐ Added Advantage:
a. Shopify App development (Private/Public Apps)
b. Payment gateway integrations (Stripe/PayPal)
c. Docker, Redis, AWS/DigitalOcean
d. Microservices / Event-driven architecture
e. Node.js or frontend basics (Vue.JS/React)

If you enjoy building scalable backend systems and working in the Shopify ecosystem, we’d love to connect.

📩 DM me or share your CV at hr@ravedigital.agency. For more details visit www.ravedigital.in/careers.
